name: claude-conversation-transfer
description: Go CLI that exports a Claude Code project's conversation history to a portable zip and imports it on another machine, correctly retargeting paths across OSes. Installs the binary AND the /export-proper and /import-proper slash commands that drive it.

prerequisites.name: go
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Go 1.23+: https://go.dev/dl/  (macOS: brew install go  ·  Windows: winget install GoLang.Go)

methods.name: git+go
methods.command: mkdir -p $HOME/.local/share && { [ -d $HOME/.local/share/claude-conversation-transfer/.git ] && git -C $HOME/.local/share/claude-conversation-transfer pull --ff-only || git clone https://github.com/arghhhhh/claude-conversation-transfer.git $HOME/.local/share/claude-conversation-transfer; } && cd $HOME/.local/share/claude-conversation-transfer && go build .

post_install_hints: Binary installed at ~/.local/share/claude-conversation-transfer/ (claude-conversation-transfer on macOS/Linux, claude-conversation-transfer.exe on Windows).
Slash commands /export-proper and /import-proper are installed alongside the binary and call it directly. They are NOT available unless this group is installed.
